ideas.title: The Secret Logistics Empire That Moves the World While You Sleep
ideas.summary: A documentary-style breakdown of the invisible overnight logistics networks that keep supermarkets, hospitals, airports, and online shopping running.
ideas.target_audience: Viewers interested in hidden systems, business operations, supply chains, and real-world documentaries.
ideas.potential: It reveals a massive everyday system most people rely on but rarely understand, making it highly clickable and evergreen.

ideas.title: Why Some Companies Stay Hidden on Purpose and Still Make Billions
ideas.summary: An exploration of low-profile private companies that avoid fame while dominating essential industries behind the scenes.
ideas.target_audience: Business-curious viewers, entrepreneurs, investors, and fans of unusual company stories.
ideas.potential: Hidden billionaire businesses create curiosity, offer strong storytelling, and fit perfectly with faceless business-documentary content.

ideas.title: The Abandoned Scientific Experiments Still Affecting Us Today
ideas.summary: A look at discontinued or forgotten scientific projects whose discoveries, mistakes, or side effects continue to influence modern life.
ideas.target_audience: Science enthusiasts, mystery viewers, documentary fans, and curious general audiences.
ideas.potential: Combines science, mystery, and historical consequences, giving the topic strong retention and broad appeal.

ideas.title: The Strange Business of Buying and Selling Human Attention
ideas.summary: A deep dive into how modern companies compete to capture, measure, package, and monetize human attention across digital platforms.
ideas.target_audience: Viewers interested in technology, media, psychology, entrepreneurship, and the attention economy.
ideas.potential: The topic is highly relevant, evergreen, and connects everyday habits to a massive hidden business model.

ideas.title: How One Tiny Component Can Shut Down an Entire Industry
ideas.summary: A documentary about how small, overlooked parts like chips, sensors, or specialized materials can create global bottlenecks when supply breaks.
ideas.target_audience: Business, technology, manufacturing, and global economy audiences.
ideas.potential: It turns a complex supply-chain concept into a dramatic story about fragility, dependence, and hidden industrial power.

ideas.title: The Hidden Economy Beneath Major Cities
ideas.summary: An investigation into the underground infrastructure, service tunnels, storage networks, utilities, and unseen labor that keep large cities alive.
ideas.target_audience: Urban exploration fans, documentary viewers, engineering enthusiasts, and mystery audiences.
ideas.potential: Underground city systems are visually compelling, mysterious, and naturally suited to high-retention faceless storytelling.

ideas.title: Why the World's Most Valuable Data Is Often Invisible
ideas.summary: A video explaining how companies collect and profit from obscure data sources such as shipping signals, satellite imagery, foot traffic, and weather patterns.
ideas.target_audience: Tech viewers, business audiences, privacy-conscious viewers, and people interested in hidden markets.
ideas.potential: Data monetization is a powerful modern mystery with strong relevance to business, surveillance, and competitive advantage.

ideas.title: The Companies That Make Money When Everything Goes Wrong
ideas.summary: A look at businesses that profit from disasters, breakdowns, recalls, lawsuits, insurance claims, and emergency demand.
ideas.target_audience: Business documentary fans, entrepreneurs, economics viewers, and viewers interested in unusual industries.
ideas.potential: The moral tension and counterintuitive business models create a compelling hook with strong discussion potential.

ideas.title: The Mystery of Products That Never Seem to Disappear
ideas.summary: An analysis of old-fashioned products that survive for decades because of habit, regulation, niche demand, or hidden industrial uses.
ideas.target_audience: General curiosity viewers, business history fans, nostalgia audiences, and entrepreneurship viewers.
ideas.potential: Familiar products with surprising reasons for survival offer an accessible, evergreen, and highly shareable format.

ideas.title: How Scientists Detect Things No Human Can See
ideas.summary: A science documentary explaining the tools and methods used to detect invisible forces, particles, signals, and phenomena in the universe.
ideas.target_audience: Science fans, space viewers, mystery audiences, and educational documentary watchers.
ideas.potential: Invisible science has strong wonder-driven appeal and allows for visually engaging storytelling around discoveries and mysteries.
